steps.voice: Here's the fast tour. First boot — the dash auto-scans CAN at the four common bitrates (125, 250, 500, 1000 kbps) and locks on to whichever your ECU is using, usually within two to four seconds.
Tap Apply to commit the matched bitrate.
Pick your ECU. Built-in presets: MaxxECU, Haltech Nexus / Elite, Link G4+, Ford BA / BF / FG, GM GEN IV LS, ECUMaster, MegaSquirt — plus Custom for hand-entered signals.
Finally, connect. Join WiFi for the web editor, plug into USB for the desktop app, or use the built-in hotspot as a fallback.
Dashboard is ready — under a minute from power-on.
And here it is live: RPM, speed, gear, throttle, coolant — the default layout driving your ECU data.
